title: Holmium
description: Even better, client side improvements and new stuff.
body:
### About
The Holmium mod pack aims to enhance every aspect your Minecraft experience while maintaining the simplicity of Minecraft. 

<details>
<summary>Enhanced Aspects</summary>
  
- Better UI/GUI and some [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) textures
- New sounds and particles
- Some optimizations
- Some small utilities
  
</details>


### Updates
I will update Holmium only to the lastest stable minecraft versions.

[![donate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adca3088c3d2dd4353fce413afd87fab80dbbdda.png)](https://nederliver.net/donate.html)
